title: sophora glauca
intro: Sophora glauca, also known as the blue sophora or Chinese sophora, is a perennial legume native to China and other parts of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sophora glauca include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Sophora glauca are typically made by drying and processing the plant's roots, leaves, and stems, which can then be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
